    • exception

      public void exception(Exception e)
      Log an exception
      Parameters:
      e - The exception to be logged

    • shutDown

      public void shutDown()
      Shutdown the logger, thread will sleep for 1000ms to allow proper flushing NOTE: This does not kill the program, it just shutsdown the logger

    • die

      public void die()
      Shutdown the logger, sleep for a second to allow the logger to finish flushing to disk then kill the program with exit code NOTE: This traps the calling thread!

    • die

      public void die(String log_message)
      Shutdown the logger, adding a final log message onto the queue before killing the program
      Parameters:
      log_message - The message ot be logged before shutdown

    • die

      public void die(Exception e)

    • die

      public void die(Exception e, String log_message)

    • autoLog

      public void autoLog(String log_message)
      This function will automatically log an INFO message for the calling class name, function name, and line number of the function call. It also accepts an optional log message. Function is useful to see where execution may have stopped, or where a specific area of interest shows up without forcing the user to add line specific or message specific messages to the logger call. NOTE: It's not a particularily fast function to call
      Parameters:
      log_message - Message to add to the Class name, function name, and line number

    • autoLog

      public void autoLog()
      See full description above: autoLog call without log message

    • errFrom

      public void errFrom(String errMsg)
      See above for full description, substitute INFO for ERR

    • exceptionFromAndDie

      public void exceptionFromAndDie(Exception e)

      public String getStackInfo(Object msg)
      Builds the stack information string for autologging
